name: Treasure Chest
recipeIngredient: Prepared Jello with raspberries and/or gumdrops or other small candies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a 1/2-inch horizontal slice off the top of the cake and set it aside.
2. Carefully hollow out the center of the cake, leaving a 1/2-inch shell on the bottom and sides. Reserve the removed cake for snacking or other use.
3. Spoon 1 cup of whipped topping into the cake shell.
4. Frost the sides with 1-1/2 cups of whipped topping.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Just before serving, place assorted "jewels" (fruit chews, candy necklaces, prepared Jello with raspberries and/or gumdrops, or other small candies) over the whipped topping in the cake shell.
7. Use the reserved cake slice as an open chest lid by arranging pretzel rod pieces to resemble a handle.
8. Frost the reserved cake slice with remaining whipped topping.
9. Decorate with miniature candy-coated semi-sweet chocolate candies and black licorice.
10. Add the remaining pretzels to the ends of the cake for handles.
